feedback.title: Feedback
feedback.subtitle: Help me improve
feedback.bugDescription: Found something wrong? Let me know so I can fix it.
feedback.featureDescription: Have an idea? I'd love to hear your suggestions.
feedback.githubNote: You'll be redirected to GitHub to submit your feedback.
feedback.formTitlePlaceholder: Brief summary of the issue or idea
feedback.formSuccess: Thank you! Your feedback has been submitted.
feedback.formError: Failed to submit. Please try again.
feedback.logHint: Max 50KB. File content will be included in the report.
feedback.logTooLarge: File too large. Maximum size is 50KB.

mozii.name: mozii
mozii.tagline: Play your music files with style
mozii.description: A file-based music player with lyrics translation, animated lyrics, and endless customization — all wrapped in a clean, minimal design.

playback.title: Lyrics Translation & Animated Lyrics
playback.description: View translated lyrics in real time and enjoy beautifully animated lyrics that sync with your music.

library.title: Minimal Design
library.description: A clean, simple interface that stays out of your way and lets you focus on your music.

ui.title: Fully Customizable
ui.description: Personalize your experience with extensive settings — themes, layouts, playback behaviors, and more.

guide.step1: Add your music files to mozii and start browsing your library.
guide.step2: Tap a track to play and enjoy animated lyrics with translation support.
guide.step3: Explore settings to customize the interface and playback to your liking.

mapMemory.name: Map Memory
mapMemory.description: Automatically records your location history, like a personal timeline of your life.

timeline.title: Location Timeline
timeline.description: View your past locations on an interactive timeline, similar to Google Maps Timeline.

map.title: Visual Map View
map.description: See all your visited places plotted on a beautiful, interactive map.

privacy.title: Privacy First
privacy.description: All data stays on your device. Your location history is yours alone.

guide.step1: Grant location permissions and let Map Memory start recording in the background.
guide.step2: Check your timeline anytime to see where you've been throughout the day.
guide.step3: Browse the map view to explore all the places you've visited over time.

gphones.name: GPhones
gphones.description: Measure your real-time speed using GPS and keep a detailed record of every trip.

speed.title: Real-time Speed
speed.description: Get accurate, GPS-based speed readings displayed in a clean, easy-to-read format.

tracking.title: Trip Recording
tracking.description: Record your entire journey with detailed speed data throughout the trip.

history.title: Speed History
history.description: Review past trips with speed graphs, max speed, average speed, and distance.

guide.step1: Open GPhones and grant GPS permissions for accurate speed readings.
guide.step2: Start a trip recording to capture your speed throughout the journey.
guide.step3: Review your trip history with detailed speed charts and statistics.

hero.title: Apps crafted with care
hero.subtitle: I build iOS apps that are simple, beautiful, and useful.

notFound.title: Page Not Found
notFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist.

about.title: About
about.education: M.S. in Computer & Information Science, Temple University (2023–2025)
